scripts.format:check: npx --yes prettier@3.2.4 . --check --ignore-unknown --cache-location /tmp/acevo-prettier-cache && npx --yes editorconfig-checker@5.1.8 && npm run format:python:check
scripts.format:python: docker run --rm -u $(id -u):$(id -g) -v "$PWD:/io" -w /io ghcr.io/astral-sh/ruff:0.15.12 format --no-cache scripts tests
scripts.format:python:check: docker run --rm -u $(id -u):$(id -g) -v "$PWD:/io" -w /io ghcr.io/astral-sh/ruff:0.15.12 format --no-cache --check scripts tests
